phishing_templates.name: Microsoft 365 Security Alert 2024
phishing_templates.subject: Action Required: Unusual Sign-in Activity Detected
phishing_templates.html_content:
Microsoft

Security Alert for {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}

⚠️ Unusual Sign-in Activity Detected
We detected a sign-in attempt from an unrecognized device or location.

Hello {{.FirstName}},

We noticed unusual activity on your Microsoft 365 account:

  • Time: Today at 3:47 AM
  • Location: Unknown (IP: 185.220.100.242)
  • Device: Unrecognized Linux system
  • Browser: Tor Browser

If this wasn't you, your account may be compromised.

To secure your account and review recent activity:

Review Account Activity

This security review will expire in 24 hours for your protection.

If you ignore this alert, we may temporarily suspend your account to prevent unauthorized access.

Thank you,
Microsoft Security Team

Microsoft Corporation | One Microsoft Way, Redmond, WA 98052

This message was sent to {{.Email}}. If you received this email by mistake, please ignore it.
phishing_templates.text_content:
Microsoft Security Alert

Hello {{.FirstName}},

We detected unusual activity on your Microsoft 365 account:
- Time: Today at 3:47 AM
- Location: Unknown (IP: 185.220.100.242)
- Device: Unrecognized Linux system

To secure your account, please review your recent activity: {{.URL}}

This security review will expire in 24 hours.

Thank you,
Microsoft Security Team

phishing_templates.name: Bank Security Update QR Code 2024
phishing_templates.subject: Urgent: New Mobile Banking Security Features - Action Required
phishing_templates.html_content:
🏛️ SecureBank

Your Security is Our Priority

Important Security Update Required

⚠️ Action Required by December 31, 2024
New security regulations require all customers to update their mobile banking app.

Dear {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}},

Due to recent cybersecurity threats, we're implementing enhanced protection for all mobile banking users.

📱 Quick Mobile Update

Scan the QR code below with your phone camera to install the security update:

[QR Code would be here]
Scan to Update
Links to: {{.URL}}

Or click here: Update Mobile Banking Security

This update includes:

  • Enhanced biometric authentication
  • Real-time fraud detection
  • Improved encryption protocols
  • New multi-factor authentication

⏰ Important: Accounts without the security update will have limited access starting January 1, 2025.

If you have questions, contact our 24/7 security helpline: 1-800-SECURE-1

Best regards,
SecureBank Security Team

SecureBank | 123 Financial St, Banking City, BC 12345

This message was sent to {{.Email}}. For security, never share your login credentials.
phishing_templates.text_content:
SecureBank Security Update

Dear {{.FirstName}},

Due to new security regulations, you must update your mobile banking app by December 31, 2024.

Please visit: {{.URL}} to complete the security update.

Accounts without the update will have limited access starting January 1, 2025.

SecureBank Security Team
1-800-SECURE-1

phishing_templates.name: IT Support Vishing Follow-up 2024
phishing_templates.subject: Follow-up: System Maintenance Verification Required
phishing_templates.html_content:
🔧 Corporate IT Support

Technical Services Department

System Maintenance Follow-up

Hello {{.FirstName}},

Following our phone conversation earlier today about the critical system maintenance, we need to verify your account access to complete the security updates.

📞 Call Reference: INC-2024-{randomnumber}
⏰ Call Time: Today at 10:23 AM
🔧 Technician: Mike Johnson (Ext. 4751)
📋 Issue: Critical Windows security patch deployment

As discussed, we detected potential vulnerabilities in your system that require immediate patching. The maintenance window has been extended to accommodate all users.

To complete the verification process:

  1. Click the verification link below
  2. Confirm your identity using your network credentials
  3. Download and install the security patch
  4. Restart your computer when prompted
Complete System Verification

⚠️ Important: Systems not updated by end of business today may be temporarily disconnected from the network for security reasons.

If you have any questions, please call the IT Help Desk at extension 4751 or reply to this email.

Thank you for your cooperation,
Mike Johnson
Senior System Administrator
IT Security Team

Corporate IT Department | Internal Use Only

This email was generated automatically following incident INC-2024-{randomnumber}
phishing_templates.text_content:
IT Support Follow-up

Hello {{.FirstName}},

Following our phone call about critical system maintenance, please verify your account to complete security updates.

Call Reference: INC-2024-{randomnumber}
Technician: Mike Johnson (Ext. 4751)

Please complete verification: {{.URL}}

Systems not updated by end of business may be disconnected for security.

IT Security Team
Extension 4751

phishing_templates.name: DocuSign Urgent Document 2024
phishing_templates.subject: URGENT: Document Requires Your Signature - Expires Today
phishing_templates.html_content:
DocuSign

Digital Transaction Management

Document Signature Required

⚠️ URGENT - EXPIRES TODAY
This document requires your immediate attention and signature.

Hello {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}},

You have been sent a document that requires your signature. This document was sent by your organization's legal department and contains time-sensitive information.

📄 Document Details

Document Name: Employment_Agreement_Amendment_2024.pdf

From: Legal Department (legal@company.com)

Pages: 12

Deadline: Today, 11:59 PM EST

Status: Awaiting Your Signature

Document Summary:

  • Updated compensation structure for 2024
  • New remote work policy terms
  • Updated benefits package
  • Non-disclosure agreement updates

⏰ Time Sensitive: This document expires at midnight tonight. Late signatures may affect your compensation adjustments.

Review & Sign Document

Please ensure you have a valid form of identification ready for the signature process.

If you have questions about this document, contact the Legal Department at legal@company.com or call (555) 123-4567.

Best regards,
DocuSign Service Team

DocuSign, Inc. | 221 Main Street, Suite 1000, San Francisco, CA 94105

This message was sent to {{.Email}}. This document is confidential and intended only for the recipient.

If you no longer wish to receive DocuSign emails, you can unsubscribe.
phishing_templates.text_content:
DocuSign Document Signature Required

Hello {{.FirstName}},

You have a time-sensitive document requiring your signature:

Document: Employment_Agreement_Amendment_2024.pdf
From: Legal Department
Deadline: Today, 11:59 PM EST

Please sign immediately: {{.URL}}

Contact legal@company.com with questions.

DocuSign Service Team

phishing_templates.name: Google Workspace Security Alert 2024
phishing_templates.subject: Security Alert: Suspicious Activity on Your Google Workspace
phishing_templates.html_content:
Google Workspace

Security alert for {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}

🛡️ We detected suspicious activity
Someone may have accessed your Google Workspace account from an unusual location.

Hi {{.FirstName}},

We noticed some unusual activity on your Google Workspace account and want to make sure it's really you.

Suspicious sign-in details:

Time: December 15, 2024 at 2:33 AM PST

Device: Unknown Windows device

Location: Approximate location based on IP address: Romania

IP Address: 91.234.123.45

If this was you: You can ignore this alert.

If this wasn't you: We recommend securing your account immediately.

Secure Your Account

We'll help you:

  • Change your password
  • Review recent account activity
  • Set up 2-step verification
  • Remove unfamiliar devices

You can also review your recent security activity by visiting your Google Account.

Thanks for helping us keep your account secure.

The Google Workspace Team

Google LLC | 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

This email was sent to {{.Email}} because you enabled security alerts for your Google Workspace account.
phishing_templates.text_content:
Google Workspace Security Alert

Hi {{.FirstName}},

We detected suspicious activity on your account:

Time: December 15, 2024 at 2:33 AM PST
Device: Unknown Windows device
Location: Romania
IP: 91.234.123.45

If this wasn't you, secure your account: {{.URL}}

The Google Workspace Team
